'''''AZ 380''''' was a [[Gallofree Yards, Inc./Legends|Gallofree Yards, Inc.]] [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]] docked to the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Azzameen family|Azzameen]] [[Azzameen Station/Legends|Home Base]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
